confirm.unlink: This study will be detached from the patient and returned to the unlinked queue. Continue?
confirm.archive: This study will be archived. Original images are never deleted. Continue?

upload.title: Upload Image
upload.fileHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP or DICOM (.dcm) — up to {{max}} MB
upload.failed: Upload failed. Check the file type and size.

patient.empty: No imaging studies for this patient
patient.emptyDescription: Use the "Upload Image" button to add an X-ray, panoramic or CBCT image.

queue.title: Unlinked Images
queue.subtitle: Imaging studies not yet linked to a patient
queue.emptyDescription: Studies uploaded without a patient or received from the bridge appear here.

linkModal.title: Link to Patient
linkModal.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient name or phone...
linkModal.confirm: This study will be linked to {{name}}. Continue?

devices.title: Imaging Devices
devices.description: X-ray sensors, panoramic/CBCT units and scanners in the clinic
devices.name: Device Name
devices.deactivateConfirm: This device will be deactivated, or deleted if it was never used. Continue?
devices.deactivateBody: "{{name}}" will be marked inactive. It stays available historically and can be reactivated at any time.
devices.emptyDescription: Add a device first so images can be associated with it.
devices.deletePermanentlyBody: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
devices.deletePermanentlyWarningBridgeConfig: Any Bridge Agent configuration using this device ID will stop working.
devices.deleteBlockedInUse: This device has historical imaging records and cannot be permanently deleted. You can deactivate it instead.
devices.copyFailed: Unable to copy. Select the text manually to copy it.
devices.bridgeConfigHelp: Paste this object into the "watches" array of the bridge agent's config.json. Update the "path" to the clinic PC's real export folder — it is only a placeholder here.
devices.availableBridgeDevicesDescription: Devices that can be used in this clinic's Bridge Agent configuration. No agent is automatically linked to a device.

bridges.title: Bridge Agents
bridges.description: Local agents connecting the clinic's imaging software to NoraMedi
bridges.name: Agent Name
bridges.revokeConfirm: This agent's token will be invalidated immediately and the agent will no longer be able to connect. Continue?
bridges.revokeBody: "{{name}}"'s token will be invalidated immediately and the agent will no longer be able to connect. It stays available historically.
bridges.emptyDescription: Register an agent to set up the local imaging bridge.
bridges.deletePermanentlyBody: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted and its token will immediately become invalid. This action cannot be undone.
bridges.deletePermanentlyWarningToken: Deleting this bridge immediately invalidates its token.
bridges.deleteBlockedInUse: This bridge agent has connected or created imaging records and cannot be permanently deleted. You can revoke it instead.

token.title: Bridge Token
token.warning: This token is visible only NOW. After closing this window it can never be shown again — if you lose it, revoke the agent and register a new one.

card.title: NoraMedi Bridge for Windows
card.description: A Windows app that connects the clinic's imaging devices to NoraMedi — no technical knowledge required.
card.supportedSystems: Supported systems: Windows 10/11 (64-bit) or Windows Server 2016 and later
card.notAvailable: This feature is not yet available for your clinic.
card.installerUnavailable: The installer isn't published yet. Please check back later.
card.unsignedWarning: This is an unsigned pilot/test build. Windows may show an "Unknown publisher" warning during install.

devices.description: Choose the imaging devices this computer will connect. You must select at least one device.
devices.empty: No active bridge-eligible devices yet. Add an imaging device first.

install.description: Do the following on the clinic computer (reception desk, X-ray room, etc.):
install.step1: Download the installer using the button below
install.unsignedWarning: This pilot build is unsigned; Windows may show an "Unknown publisher" warning. Choose "Run anyway" to continue.

pairing.createFailed: Could not create the pairing code
pairing.enterInManager: Enter this code in NoraMedi Bridge Manager:

status.used: This code has already been used.
status.locked: This code was locked after too many failed attempts.

success.title: "{{name}}" connected successfully
success.description: The bridge is now registered with NoraMedi. Use NoraMedi Bridge Manager to choose local folders.
success.nextSteps: You can now select the folders to watch for the connected devices in NoraMedi Bridge Manager.

viewer.title: DICOM Viewer
viewer.unsupportedTransferSyntax: This DICOM file uses an unsupported transfer syntax (compression) and cannot be previewed in the browser. You can still download it securely.
viewer.multiFrameUnsupported: Multi-frame DICOM viewing is not supported in this version. You can still download the file securely.
viewer.loadFailed: Unable to load the image. Please try again.
